description_long: This is a two-story urban house with a flat roof and a rooftop terrace surrounded by white balustrades. The exterior walls are painted a light pastel color, accented by a bold red trim along the roofline and balcony edges. The front facade features a covered porch supported by columns, a wooden main door, and a large window with a decorative grille. Multiple windows of varying sizes, some with colored frames, are distributed asymmetrically across the walls. Utility pipes and a small rooftop structure are visible, along with a separate brick enclosure and a circular well or tank adjacent to the house. The overall design is functional and modern, with hints of South Asian or Mediterranean influence in the decorative elements and color palette.
description: A two-story urban house with a flat roof, rooftop terrace, pastel walls, red trim, and a covered porch. Features include decorative window grilles, white balustrades, and visible utility pipes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, large window with grille, and colorful window frames.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the rooftop terrace, back door, and adjacent brick enclosures and circular tank.
description_view_2: Side view displaying multiple windows, the terrace railing, and utility pipes along the wall.
description_view_3: Side view with visible utility pipes, decorative window grille, and the rooftop structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, wooden main door, and decorative grille window
